value_chain_position: Photonics and optical components — makes transceivers, ROADM line-cards, coherent modules (indium-phosphide) and 3D sensing lasers for data-center optical interconnects and consumer LiDAR.
relative_comps: LITE's 69% YoY revenue surge reflects the AI-driven 800G/1.6T transceiver ramp — hyperscalers are buying optical modules at unprecedented rates. The indium-phosphide fab gives LITE vertical integration that fabless optical peers lack. FCF margin of 11% is still rebuilding post-merger integration; peers like CRDO run at 21%. COHR (merged II-VI) is the closest full-stack competitor. At $67B market cap LITE trades at a meaningful premium to revenue but the 1.6T cycle and 3D-sensing pipeline (Apple adjacency) justify the multiple relative to mature optical peers.
